payload.code: const eventUrl = row.event_url || row.input?.event_url || ''; const requiresAuth = /linkedin\.com\/events\//.test(eventUrl); return { event_url: eventUrl, public_first: true, fallback_required: requiresAuth };

commands.run_if_js: const md = row.public_fetch?.data?.markdown || ''; return md.length < 500 || /sign in|login|authwall/i.test(md);

payload.code: const publicText = row.public_fetch?.data?.markdown || ''; const apifyItems = row.apify_extract?.data?.items || row.apify_extract?.items || []; const organizers = apifyItems.map((item) => ({ name: item.name || item.fullName || '', title: item.title || item.headline || '', company: item.company || '', linkedin_url: item.linkedinUrl || item.url || '', source: 'apify', confidence: item.linkedinUrl ? 0.85 : 0.55 })); return { event_url: row.route.data.event_url, public_text_chars: publicText.length, organizers, needs_fallback_csv: organizers.length === 0 };
